title: PMO
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW

A well-established, global technology services company delivering IT solutions, infrastructure support, and outsourced operational services. It works with clients across various sectors to enhance efficiency and strengthen digital capabilities.

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Provide PMO support including preparing documentation, coordinating sessions, and assisting with reporting.    
  • Engage with Japan based teams via email and online meetings to support project coordination.      
  • Address project related topics with the Project Manager and ensure alignment across teams.
  • Assist in managing end-to-end project activities including requirements, solution design, development coordination, testing, acceptance, training, rollout, and documentation, following internal project governance standards.     
  • Build a solid understanding of business needs, system architecture concepts, and solution design principles.

JOB REQUIREMENTS  

  • Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • Atleast 4 years of experience within IT or project related environments.       
  • Prior experience as a PMO or involvement in IT project management.
  • Prior banking or financial experience is not required.
  • Japanese language proficiency (written and spoken) to communicate effectively with Japan based teams and stakeholders.    
  • Liaise directly with Japan based teams and address project matters with the Japanese Project Manager.
  • Experience working in multinational teams or on cross border‑ projects.      
  • Experience in interpreting business workflows and create structured documentation such as process maps, system overviews, and configuration summaries using tools like Excel or PowerPoint.
  • Understanding on banking concepts such as loans, deposits, accounting workflows, customer information systems, and general IT processes is good to have.   
  • Familiarity with one or more of the following areas (good to have): Foreign Exchange, Money Market, Derivatives (e.g., Interest Rate Swap, Cross Currency‑ Swap), Bonds, Local payment systems, Cross border or ‑high value‑payment platforms.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the above positions, please click "Apply now".

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Working Location: Singapore

Bhadoria Shilpalekha Vikas (R1876178)
JAC Recruitment Pte. Ltd. (90C3026)

postedCompany.description:
JAC is an international recruitment consultancy with over 45 years of specialised recruitment experience across Asia and Europe. We have over 1,200 expert consultants who have a deep cultural understanding of the local markets they operate in. Combined with our regional network and specialised industry focus we are renowned for placing highly skilled permanent and contracting staff into specialist positions.

In Singapore, we cover the Banking and Financial Services, Corporate Services, Digital and Information Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Industrial, Sales & Marketing sectors. We also recruit for contract roles and have a dedicated team that can assist with hiring for Japanese-language skills.

Our job board is updated daily so you can stay updated on jobs as they become available and find the next best role for you.

EA License number: 90C3026
